channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: Been around any wagies/normies lately? — 46 replies — 184.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Been around any wagies/normies lately?

Open thread • Replies: 46 • Updated: 2026-04-06 23:11 UTC

OP

They are 100% DONE.

Completely and totally blackpilled, they make /pol/tards look like hyper motivated Supermen. The average wagecuck is a zombified corpse shuffling through life and just waiting to die, it's wild. The funniest part is what miniscule amount of energy they have left is used exclusively to hyper aggressively cope with other normalfags.

They all go through this weird dance where they "flex" on each other and put up a fabricated front that they are "doing well" while they all circle the toilet drain together. It makes it impossible to feel sorry for them as they continue to rack up debt and live miserable atomized lives.

Game over goyim

Early replies (first 3)

62080565
>>62080562
My favorite part about this system is that by not playing their "pretending to do well" game, you just save up as much as possible and make it to the other side of the K economy lol

62080574
>>62080562
Nigger I'm demoralized too. You have any fucking idea where you are?

62080580
>>62080562
If you weren't part of the top 10% in 2025, you're lower class

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62081311
>>62080562
I'm tired of being a mid 30s incel ugly loser, so I've finally caved in and started fucking fat emo and goth chicks that are married and in open/poly relationships, because those types are always hitting me up.

62081333
4 months ago i stopped wageslaving because i wanted to have time to do the things that i want to do. Iam in the six figure hell. Now I dont see myself going back to waging. I kms if i go back to work or the day i run out of money. Sleeping and not having to deal with coworkers is pure heaven

62081344
>>62081333
I'm so sick I don't even want to kill myself, I just want to suffer. I'll probably die of a heart condition in my 30s or 40s anyways.

62081346
>>62081311
>so I've finally caved in and started fucking fat emo and goth chicks that are married and in open/poly relationships, because those types are always hitting me up.
kek i did this too

62081356
>>62081346
I'm actually not even a bad-looking dude, but I live in the middle of nowhere, so I'm competing with Chadvicular in the cities, so I have to travel like fucking Genghis Khan to get pussy.

62081360
>>62081356
I actually enjoyed the travel aspect of it. Visited place I'd never have gone to otherwise just for pussy.

62081363
>>62081360
That's a good way to look at it. Thanks for the confidence boost bro!

62081366
>>62081363
Anytime m8. And it is, I actually do feel serious about that. I remember exploring malls I'd never have gone to otherwise, restaurants I'd never go to otherwise, new areas, all a neat little adventure with the benefit of sex.
Sometimes the sex part wouldn't even happen but I liked exploring new places. If I didn't do that I'd have just lived my usual wagie life and gone nowhere.

62081398
>>62081366
You're right. I'm really looking forward to this summer!

62081519
>>62081311
>>62081346
what's this like?

62081553
>>62081366
>mutts explore malls like if they were monuments

62081576
>>62080950
More like 1 in 10 home owner

62081585
>>62080580
Those 10% are probably majority 60+. No one should be expecting a 19 year old to be millionaire.

62081607
>>62080562
I fucking love my job, problem is i have to work like 15 hours of overtime a week, but i am quite gainfully employed

62081613
>>62081576
>>62080950
>>62080580
Honestly thats not that good considering over 1 in 10 adults is a Baby Boomer

62081614
>>62081613
1 in 5 are boomers, apparently. I just looked it up myself kek

62081625
>>62080562
Eating and drinking is the only thing that brings me momentary relief from this kiked world.

62081712
>>62081356
>>62081360
I used to drive 90 minutes at 120 miles per hour to fuck a fat Swiss girl just across the border from Germany.

62081787
>>62081712
European look so much more sexually arousing compared to American women. I don't know why...

62082042
>>62080562
Normals are priced out of owning housing, they realize working is meaningless since it doesn't cover COL anymore. However their plan is to replace normies with brownoids working at slave wages.

62082126
>>62081124
They used to have a non called out mute button on one of the soft buttons on the side of the screen, so you could at least look away and ignore it; some of them still have it, some don't

62082149
>>62080612
This.

Holy fuck I’m so damn tired of everyone trying to take my money. Fuck this gay earth.

62082172
>>62080562
theyve started to talk the way I talk, which feels strange.

I have a friend who was talking about pedos in power/conspiracies. He was like "idk, maybe anythings possible"

62082215
dunno about other countries but in the US it is abundantly clear you will be poor no matter what anyway so why bother?

62082218
>>62081519
probably smells bad

62082421
>>62082218
/thread

I'm switching to a saggy 41 year old single mother now.

62084147
>>62080562
Well it's easy not to be a normie anymore.
Let go bread and circuses.
At least circuses.
But they can't do that.

62084150
>>62080565
It's a trap. And they fell for it.

62084186
>>62082172
Well they are a long way from saying that viruses don't exist (they don't), and that earth doesn't circle the sun (it doesn't).
And when they will, they won't be normies anymore. But i'm not waiting for them anymore.

62084193
>>62080562
fuck off the board

Open thread • Replies: 21 • Updated: 2026-04-06 23:01 UTC

OP

XRP WILL GO TO $1000

62063432

so
fxcking
bullish

62063499
>>62063419
Whoooaoaoaoaoaoaoaooaoa

62063504
>>62063419
nigga spinnin that mf, like he's michael jordan fr

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62063566
>>62063419

BOOOOOOOM SAAARS!

62064033
>>62063419

>>62064033

BOOOOOOOOOOOOOM

62066661
>>62063419

62067696
>>62063419

62072337

62073471

62073619
BOOOOMBA KABOOOMBA!

62076083
>>62063419

62078531

62079277
>>62063419
XRP will stay at $5-$6 forever. It's built it.

62081288
>>62063419

62081326
>>62063419
So bullish around the ripple

62082281
>>62063419

62082351
IT"S GOING TO $126000,,, IF BIT COIN CAN DO IT THEN SO WILL XRP,,, THE BANKS ARE GONNA USE IT
==============================
-DALE
10,000 XRP DOWNLOADED TO MY TREZOR
1002 CHAIN LINK TOKENS (THE WIFES COIN)
Sent from my iPhone 10 using Tapatalk

62082369
>>62082351
FXCKING
BXLLISH
KABOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOM

62084163
>>62079277
Your dick is built in to my ass

item.title: >SEVERAL BLASTS HEARD AT SOUTH PARS PETROCHEM FACILITY nice ceasefire, bull cucks. — 17 replies — 46.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
>SEVERAL BLASTS HEARD AT SOUTH PARS PETROCHEM FACILITY nice ceasefire, bull cucks.

Open thread • Replies: 17 • Updated: 2026-04-06 23:01 UTC

OP

>SEVERAL BLASTS HEARD AT SOUTH PARS PETROCHEM FACILITY

nice ceasefire, bull cucks. Now watch this dump.

Early replies (first 3)

62081830
A Truth Social post is more powerful than anything those goat fuckers can do. Panicans BTFO

62081833
>Katz said Israel had "just carried out a powerful strike on the largest petrochemical facility in Iran, located in Asaluyeh, a central target responsible for about 50 per cent of the country's petrochemical production."

ESCALATION BULL FAGS

expect ChatGPTs $30 Billion Dollar data center to get blown to bits now.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62081845
>>62081746
I've been hodling crude oil since feb 04. when should we get off this ride?

62081862
>>62081845
You should have gotten off already. We're minutes away from a peace deal.

62082103
I want a dump. My AMZN an GOOGL CCs are crying. Shit, am I fucking bear?

62082140
>>62081833
with what missiles? iran is out of everything

62082176
>>62082103
>am I fucking bear
Well your skin is brown

62082186
>>62082176
So what? My money is still green.

62082194
>>62081746
>South Pars offline
>Iran strikes Desalinization plants and ships anchored outside the strait
>Houthis strike Red Sea and shut it too

No one is fucking ready

62082204
>>62081746
I was edging

62082472
>>62081746
Ohnoes some bedui goatfuckers and small hat worms killing each others i my sell my cock in you tokens!

62082481
>>62081746
I remain a little puzzled as to why war is bearish. Historically war is very bullish, a (((merchant's))) delight. Even in recent history stock markets experience a slight dip then shoot up. And why would it be effecting crypto at all?
Oil prices are going up, the cost of everything is increasing... as it has been. Should mean more money, even if only due to inflation.

62082508
>>62082140
The Iranians been out of everything for weeks and yet somehow things keep blowing up outside Iran

62082662
>>62082481
https://www.garrettsignal.com/p/oil-is-the-war?utm_campaign=post-expanded-share&utm_medium=web&triedRedirect=true

https://www.garrettsignal.com/p/the-world-only-lost-20-of-its-oil?utm_source=app-post-stats-page&r=c3gqe&utm_medium=ios&triedRedirect=true

62082777
>>62082186
>so what

62084168
>>62082662
So what? This doesn't translate into fiat gaining value.

OP

>I would be a millionaire right now had I not sold my BTC 10 years ago
How do I stop the suicidal thoughts whenever I am in the middle of the wagecage?

Early replies (first 3)

62084173
just think about how SBF's doing right now

62084179
>>62084173
Probably getting gaped, if he's lucky he got his adderall prescription behind bars and therefore maybe he's enjoying it

62084180
>>62084173
He got bailed out of jail thanks to the jews overlords, and has tons of millions of stolen dollars free to use whenever he wants.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62084217
>>62084159
there are opportunities constantly. every year hundreds of stocks 10x. every day hundreds of options 10x.

item.title: The US dollars was 70% of the world's reserve currency in 2016. — 76 replies — 51.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
The US dollars was 70% of the world's reserve currency in 2016.

Open thread • Replies: 76 • Updated: 2026-04-06 21:53 UTC

OP

The US dollars was 70% of the world's reserve currency in 2016. It's 39% now.

Early replies (first 3)

62074981
>>62074965
lol no, the financial bust part is the great depression, the revolution and wars is the period between the end of ww2 and 2008, debt and restructuring was 2008 onwards

62074987
Seems like a silly unfounded chart given that gold were the main reserves before the dollar.

62075007
>>62074981
>the revolution and wars is the period between the end of ww2 and 1971, debt and restructuring was 1971 to 2008(2020 maybe?), new world order from then on

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62076528
>>62075897
>soft power of EU
South Korea has more soft power than all the EU countries combined. And if they unite with NK, they'll have more hard power too

62076535
>>62074965
Get rid. Sling bastard hook.

62076539
>>62076528
>South Korea has more soft power than all the EU countries combined
Lol.

62076546
>>62076539
It is funny that this is the state of EU isn't it

62076552
>>62075131
>>62075717
Right wing at this point means traitor as you can see at hand of these two negative morons.

62076603
>>62076546
There are people all over the planet speaking English and French, for one example. Let's count how many countries South Korea can say the same for. I'll start.

1. South Korea.

62077033
>>62076103
Get a decent amount of capital and store it in safe assets then when there is a major crash you buy quality companies at a steep discount.

62077390
>>62076517
>please believe my scam
>an industrialized territory with electricity demand in the Terra Watts is totally going to run on batteries and solar
>y-you can recycle the material from LIBs
AHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAAHHAAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHHAHAHAHAHAHHAHAHAHAHHAHAHAHAHHAHAHHAHAHAHAHHAHAHHAHAH

62077408
>>62076552
>still trying to run the "right wing" left libtardian etatist scapegoat
Did it work over the past 20 years or did it ironically had a Streisand effect to call everyone that isnt your close etatistic epistemic community a "national SOCIALIS 'right winger' "

Yeah thought so, keep a cyanide capsule close to you at all time, in July the first bond auctions fail in probably France, Italy or Japan and the collapse is going to end your fantasy

62077415
>>62074987
And gold has now surpassed the dollar as international reserve asset.

62077421
>>62077415
and? A shovel to your head and your gold stack changed the owner. There is only one universal currency among humans, its violence and the state only has mercenaries, with the state as a concept being bankrupt.

Mercenaries are great in peace times, in times of stress they are the ones ending the Prince

62077847
>>62077390
>bro I learned about solar and batteries in the 80’s. It MUST be the same ok?

The absolute state

62077968
>>62077847
You can spew the marketing shit as much as you like, LIB+solar is not going to run an industrialized economy.
>b-but china
no. China is as good as dead if it doesn't either sucks uncle sams dick real good, or invades Siberia and Kamchatka

62078052
>>62076603
England isn't even in EU dumbo

>>62077421
The absolute delusion in this thread lmao

62078161
>>62077968
Nobody said it will be the only source of power. It will the cheapest and safest with the fossils as backups. Midwit.

62079317
>>62078161
>marketing fag paddling back
lol. That is equal to admit that you are full of shit.
China has two options, conquer Siberia and Kamchatka or suck uncle sams dick real good, which means buying up as much debt as uncle sam wants to shove down chinas throat

62079408
>>62074965
so don't hold cash?

62079861
>>62078052
The EU is part of the American Empire and it will collapse with the collapse of the American Empire.
We should all want that to happen because the people who control America are genuinely evil and have no love for anyone outside of themselves.
They have turned Westerm civilisation into a Marxist slave plantation.

62080101
>>62079317
>noooooo you cannot obtain your power mostly from renewables and keep fossils as a backup, you MUST get 100% from renewables and erase the fossil industry or you are full of shit reeeeeeeeee

62080638
>>62074965
>Wars don't happen before the peak
I believe this is wrong

62080643
>>62074965
The Donald Trump effect

62080679
>>62076103
Convert to judaism.

62081636
>>62080101
>Re-newable
bullshit marketing term that comes out of the mind of a braindead 20th century behavioralized boomer that is too stupid to understand HOW an electrical grid works.

>Gas-, wood-, coal-, oil-, nuclear-, hydro- generators
can be scaled up and down in minutes being adopted to offer and demand, produces a fairly predictable amount of electricity per generator unit, independent of unpredictable weather
>Solar, Wind
cannot be scaled up and down in minutes, doesn't produce in any way any form a predictable electricity output per unit, is 100% dependent on non-predictable weather

>b-but Batteries
>like in my matchbox car when I was 5 years old in the 70s
>I just plugged it in and than had power
You cannot run an industrialized economy with a few Terawatts of potential demand that may fluctuate by a few Gigawatts on a fucking batter that relies on unpredictable electricity over a net that cannot compensate for variations over 0.5Hz

62081934
>>62074965
>39%
Where is this number coming from?

62082083
>>62081934
its pulled out of his ass
The OP is a chink living in canada working for a chinese proxy engaged in p2p propaganda

62082104
>US is reported to be fucked
>China is the most in-debt country in the world per GDP and at the same time also has the worst fertility rate
>Europe is fully bogged down by bureaucracy
>Russia might be the most fucked of them all

Where is the future then? Some thirdie countries? SEA?

62082114
>>62075897
>soft power
"One day daddy America will recognize what a good bottom bitch I am, and all my sacrifices will be worth it!"

62083254
>>62082104
Probably Africa. Angola, Kenya, Nigeria, Dijbouti and Ghana. Those can replace Europe as host for US airforce refueling stations, drone and nuclear warhead parking lot, serves the same geostrategic role as Europe currently does, just better

62083313
>>62082114
Europe never sacrificed anything. Between 1914 and 1945 various European (proto)socialist sects and European communist banker clans fucked each other sideways and opened a lane for the US to become a global hegemon, which gave the US a rational to secure global trade intervening two times.

Since 1945 the US invested in todays inflation adapted dollar value around 10T dollars into Europe (not counting private investments), it practically rebuilt Germany, the Benelux, France and Italy on its tab, kept investing into Europe, paid practically the entire bill for Europes security for 70 years on US Millenials, GenZ and GenAs credit line, multiple times had its soldiers die to clean up European decolonialisation messes and opened its market for European goods, mainly German and France exports, fucking its own domestic market. What was the ROI? European nations made deals from the 1950s on with US enemies and competition, closed its market to US goods, harassed US companies, went again down the socialist sect roads and told the US at every moment to suck it up and fuck itself, while at the same time holding its hand open for gibs.

And yes between 1948 and 1990 it made some geostrategic sense to keep paying the bill and sucking it up. Since 1992 it was irrational, since 1998 it became suicidal. Today the point is reached to cut Europa lose and send it back into the late 19th century — impoverished agrarian shitholes who have no relevant energy resources, no relevant other resources and nothing that is actually worth keeping arrogant socialist communists pissing in the US face.

In all honesty, if I were the Potus and congress, I would throw a nuke on London, Madrid, Paris and Berlin, just to make a point showing every future "Ally" that if you keep pissing off the sugar daddy, you get a nuke

62083989
>>62074965
>The US dollars was 70% of the world's reserve currency in 2016. It's 39% now.
Stablecoins fix this

item.title: Polkadot - First halving — 258 replies — 31.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
Polkadot - First halving

Open thread • Replies: 258 • Updated: 2026-04-06 15:12 UTC

OP

https://polkadothalving.com/ 10 more days. https://www.parity.io/blog/refining-polkadots-economic-architecture-issuance-DOT-DAP-and-network-adjustments
https://x.com/Polkadot/status/2028482336463945765
"
Polkadot’s economic upgrade begins rolling out in 10 days.

Enhanced tokenomics increases DOT scarcity and introduces new governance and staking mechanisms.

▸ DOT supply capped at 2.1B
▸ Emissions cut 53.6%
▸ Unbonding from 28 days to 24-48 hours
"

Early replies (first 3)

61933757
Guys?

61933779
>>61932834
10000$ @ 6.5
i dont sell my dotty

61936705
Guys?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62062500
>>62060648
How I know that people are unique little programs and that I need to input unique inputs to get the desired outputs? Is that what you're asking or?

62062550
Let me "influence" you young Vishnus of the MINDchain. Listen to one of our spiritual leaders Oliver Talé-Yaźdi how he talks about the Vishnu mindchain. Join our cult *kmh* *kmh* web3 organization where we talk about the new world order.

https://x.com/Polkadot/status/2039256751346700502

62065568
100$ end of MIND RUN

62068446
12 more hours and the thread will be alive for 30 days and that's when Gavin Wood gives me 11.5k DOT for my "influencing" of your young Vishnus of the mindchain.

62068604
i buy this shit at 6.6$ or -75% from ATH
NOW I M AT -90% DOWN

62068658
>>62068604
yeah the decline of this shit has been remarkable. and it still somehow has a $2 billion market cap.

62069192
>>62068658
im very disappointed

62069282
>>62069192
Good. Now sell so I can GIGA short it some more while shilling it on 4chan. You activated my trap card anon "Backstabbing shill" (Effect: Convince people DOT is THE SOLUTION while having a giga short open at the same time).

62071796
100$ end of bull run. And it's official, the thread has stayed alive for 30 days and therefore Gavin Wood will pay me 11.5k$. That will feed Mumbai for literally a whole year.

Thank you Vishnu

62072073
>>62071796
You're welcome.

Don't I get a little something

62073144
>>62072073
But of course Panjali, your are a citizen of Mumbai city, the city of DOT. Every citizen gets paid. We all get feed and loved by our kind lord Gavin Wood. He is the underworld CP kingpin. He sells Cheese Pizza and then redistributes the funds among DOT holders. Everyone in Mumbai is eating and licking Cheese Pizza. I also like to put some cream onto my Cheese Pizza and then lick it off.

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62075463
100$ end of bull run

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62077075
Every day after the 30th day I get 150 DOT as a bonus. If we keep the thread alive for 30 more days I'll get 30 * 150 = 4500 more DOT. Please help contribute so my village of Mumbai gets feed.

62078039
>>62077075
You are not in India

62078216
>>62078039
This is my hand >>62008295 young Vishnu. This was taken directly from Mumbai, the city of DOT.

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62078593
Dont selling my dotty anymore

62078595
75

62078631
Depressing thread

62078789
>>62078216
Fake

62079572
>>62078631
Well, I've already got my 11.5k DOT that Gaving promised me and every day this thread stay alive I get an additional 150DOT. Doesn't really seem depressing to me

>>62078593
>>62078595
100$ END OF BULL RUN

>>62078789
I am brown as chocolate itself. I am a true Mumbai warrior

Thank you for keeping the thread alive my Mumbai warriors. You are feeding your village. This is a cooperative effort. The mumbai boys strike AGAIN


Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62079598
This is the most damaging thread for dot in history

62079614
>>62079598
Read this >>62069282. We're playing this whole board. They're eating right out of our hands. First we make them believe that DOT is held by the GLAMOROUS citizens of Mumbai. Then at the same time we pocket the money from Gavin Wood for keeping the thread alive. AND at the same time we SHORT IT TO 0$. The whole city of Mumbai is in on it. INDIA SUPER POWER BY 2020 wasn't a lie. It's a FACT for 6 years already.

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62079649
>>62079614
But is the tech good?

62079750
>>62079649
Literally THE BEST chain currently. And no, I'm not just making shit up. It literally does what everyone else is trying to do. Once JAM + NOMT hit it'll be able to do MILLIONS of TPS (not just value tx) while doing continous compute, while being 100% decentalized, while the tx will be CHEAP, while having NATIVE interoperability, while being able to control other chains and never leave DOT, ... This projects is THE project and people are still buying meme coins. It's UNFATHOMABLE.

62080914
I hope you guys smell the bottom. I can smell the bottom of the Vishnu mindchain. I hope you're going in HARD and DEEP. I hope you guys are PENETRATING THE BOTTOM of the market. I hope you're bouncing up and down on that bottom. I hope you're eating that bottom out and scooping it up. Mmmm, that delicious Vishnu bottom. It has a great taste inside my mouth. I hope you guys are enjoying it as much as I am. I'll leave some cream for you so it tastes even better.

62080937
>>62079649
DOT is literally the most superior blockchain out there. Everything that other people promise and don't deliver DOT already has. Everything that other people lie about and can't do DOT can do. The really BIG upgrade we're waiting on is JAM and NOMT this year
Read more here >>62026407 and >>62056612 and >>62056570. NOMT + JAM scale the network to more a few million or maybe 10-20m TPS. We currently have the highest recorded TPS on a live network (https://data.parity.io/spammening). 143.3k TPS on a live network (NOT TEST NET BULLSHITERY like the other chains are showcasing). This was done one 23 of the 100 cores that are available. So this was only 23% of the full capacity. Some cores are already sold to other chains therefore we can't do a full test. But you can guesstimate the numbers, right? And since the last spammening the throughput has gone up. We could now probably do like 250k TPS from 23 cores or something like that. Just look at the "Performance Charts" on the page I linked. The fees were literally almost always below 0.05$. The fees were around 0.03 to 0.015$ even when the network handled 140k TPS. Do you remember how Solana halted the network literally 8x due to it being congested and shit like that? That can't happen on DOT. The average finality was 16.58s. The thing is though, we'll soon be getting 500ms blocks. When the tests were conducted the block times were still 12s? Now they're 6s and soon they'll be 500ms (Basti blocks). A lot is happening on DOT this year!
Also if you look at the stats the network has been growing over time https://data.parity.io/parachain-stats?selection-mode=include&frequency=daily

62080949
>>62079649
Also combine that with the new tokenomics and the long term vision for the project... I really don't see this project becoming irrelevant to be honest. It simply JUST FUCKING DOES WHAT IT'S SUPPOSED TO DO. The other L2s are behind and they won't catch up ever in my opinion. Once JAM hits DOT will be AT LEAST 5 to 10 years ahead of all the major L2s and L1s. It's not even comparable to be honest. People are blind to not see it. Sooner or later people will wake up and realize "OMG, I've been a degenerate memecoin gambler while I could buy the Vishnu of the blockchain".
Simply put, this project does what others promise and don't deliver. DOT has already DELIVERED and is DELIVERING even more amazing things that no other chain has and if they do they don't package it like DOT does. Sure ICP has continous compute, but does it have native interoperability and can host L2s and smart contracts and has 500ms block times and is decentralized and has shared security to his L2s and has the best governance system in crypto and has over a few million TPS and has ... and has ... Bro, it's fucking impossible to beat DOT on technical superiority. Some day people will realize that they can't build a new use case on the other chains. That they're LIMITING THEMSELVES by staying on shit like ARB or POL or some other fucking shit like that. A few months back Polkadot Asset Hub launched and people can simply copy paste EVM code to DOT and it'll work. We're currently waiting for this referendum (https://polkadot.polkassembly.io/referenda/1864) to pass in order for Uniswap and Safe to launch on Asset Hub. Other major projects will probably follow. Should pass any day now. Slow and steady wins the race

62081930
>>62079750
>>62080914
>>62080937
>>62080949

Why should we believe some one from India

62082053
>>62081930
Truth is not to be believed. Truth is to be seen. Just try the chain out. And look at the data. I've provided you with plenty of evidence. You SHOULD NOT believe me. The essence of crypto is what? DYOR. Do Your Own Research. We really did forget our roots, didn't we?

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62082374
>>62081930
I actually applaud you to be honest. Anon, I'm proud of you. Thank you for having CRITICAL thinking. We need more people like you. And again DYOR and you WILL come to similar if not EXACTLY THE SAME conclusions. I dare you, I double dare you, I triple dare you.

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

item.title: Financially Fucked By My Father — 55 replies — 28.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
Financially Fucked By My Father

Open thread • Replies: 55 • Updated: 2026-04-06 21:26 UTC

OP

My dad has no life insurance. Still owes $75k on the mortgage with 8 years to go. He only has $5k in the bank and $5k in his 401k at 63 years old.

He doesn't do ANY maintenance on the house. The basement hasn't had a dehumidifier in it for 7 years and it's full of rat shit and probably mold. The roof is overdue by 2 years and it'll cost about $20k for a new roof. Water collects around the foundation of the house when it rains and he doesn't do anything about it. The water filters need to be changed twice a month, but he only does it once a month, so there's rust in both bathrooms. The master bathroom bathtub drain leaks into the basement and he hasn't fixed it in 4 years, so he just showers in the other bathroom. The kitchen sink leaks water. The fridge is brown from dirt and grime. The stove is covered in dirt and grime. The microwave above the stove is broken, so he has a separate microwave on the counter. The carpet is 20 years old and destroyed. The laminate flooring is peeling away. The window sills are bubbled and peeled from water damage. The furnace is 20 years old. The garage has no electricity running to it and the garage door is broken. He doesn't even fix that when he used to install and repair garage doors as a job for 30 years. There are cobwebs in the living areas. The porches are falling apart and it's a tripping hazard every time you walk up the stairs.

All he does is get drunk, jackoff to porn, blast music and mow the lawn.

Having a parent that is lazy, financially retarded and unhygienic will screw you over when it comes to owning and maintaining a home. I refuse to put $100k into the house to make it enjoyable to live in, especially when he's still living there.

My mom is awesome though and she lives with me.

Are you in the same situation, or did you get lucky enough to have intelligent, hardworking parents that actually care about your future finances?

Early replies (first 3)

62078756
>>62078722
so sound like a faggot

62078808
>insure house alot
>fire
>profit

62078820
>>62078722
Not really seeing how your dad's financial issues affect you at all though, much less how you are "financially fucked" by this.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62080770
>>62080252
hnnggthatstiight/10

62081239
>>62080670
>My concern right now is making sure my kids don't get too _much_ of an inheritance. It will make them soft and deprive them of accomplishment.

Give them responsibilities from young, help them get jobs in HS and give them a place in society. Problem solved. People think just having a kid live in a comfy house is enough, but you have to INSTRUCT the kid and guide him. Foster wisdom through experiences and reflection (explaining to the kid why you do the things you do).

62081248
>>62078722
Why don't you help him fix important stuff on the house? One day It'll be yours.

62081353
>>62078942
Stop bitching, my aunt stole my entire inheritance and ran it into the ground/spent it before our lawsuit could get a judgement. I feel bad for my dad but he was able to build everything back for himself and taught me how to make money by making me do it myself just like his dad. If you’re upset enough that it bothers you just know that making money is easy but it’s very slow. You may think $100 here and there is beneath you but if you scale it right after making that 1,000 times you are onto something. Then it compounds and grows from there and eventually it’s $500 a pop before you know it. I would sell things in bulk, or flip things. And I’m talking anything you can get cheap. I did coins, antiques, and furniture first, now I’m doing properties. It’s basically the same business model as selling drugs but you have to factor in taxes and shipping/misc expenses.

62081399
>>62078722
Did be at least buy you a home before fucking you?

62081401
>>62078854
The only thing more based is he wrenched on classic cars and played Quake 3

62081408
arent mutts houses made of plywood?

so this house is worthless anyway, just destroy it and sell the land when he dies

fucking faggot

62081418
My boomers parent are just hard wired to scam me into living the ideal real life.

62081433
>>62080252
Life in prison/10

62081434
>>62080727
Based!

62081439
>>62081248
He doesn't do any maintenance and I don't live there. Even if I did the basement, foundation and roof (which are the current priorities) he wouldn't maintain any of it. I'd rather just invest the cash in a brokerage and have liquidity instead of dumping into an asset where I can't access it unless I sell the property. And on average, only 70% of the cash used to renovate and repair a home goes into the equity of the house, at least according to the interest. So, if you dump $100k into repairing and renovating a home, you'll only increase the equity by about $70k.

62081480
>>62078968
yeah, i can tell you got kicked out of your parents house at 18 and actually bought their excuse huh? sorry your parents don't love you anon, that really sucks.

My parents are currently restoring their house for generational use when they die, fancy new backyard and everything.

62081481
>>62079915
my mum never took anything for her schizo until she had a total breakdown in her early 60s, now she's a bit of a zombie on the drugs, she was 'okay' prior to all that, but yeah. It sucks, hope your friend can keep it together long term.

Stay away from vaccines.

62081523
>>62081481
Thank you man.

62081603
>>62078968
good slave, abandon all familial ties and be the perfect atomic consumer labor unit

62081615
>>62081353
lmao bruh i'm not even mad about it
shit just is what it is, happens a lot

62081637
HAHAHAH OH ACTUALLY WOW
How can you be so fucking entitled to say your father fucked YOU over?

I have always have the mindset that I will get nothing from my parents and will have to make whatever I want myself
They only way your parents fucked you over was to raise you to be such a fucking prick that assumes he need mommy or daddys money to even live a decent life

62081660
>>62078722
Similar father here OP

>gets made redundant from civil service role (how i have no idea)
>spends it all on trip to NY with my sister (fuck me and my mum i suppose)
>Tries to claim unemployment benifits
>Mother is working so he is entitled to fuck all
>"Ugh they wont give me a thing"
>does nothing
>sleeps 15 hours a day
>wants to "fix" the garden
>Asks me for money then never does anything
>"Yeah i never got around to getting the stuff"
>Me and mother work constantly to keep house going
>ive sank thousands into a new heating system, paying bills, fixing shit etc

I want to move out but i feel bad just abandoning everyone, the place WILL go to shit big time if i stop paying bills and generally doing what my fucking father SHOULD be doing

62081724
>>62081439
The issue is that water damage starts slow and manageable, but if not addressed it will completely destroy things for good. spending 5k on repairs now might save you 100k in just 5 years. Mold/erosion/water damage is absolute "house cancer" and you want to get rid of it fast!

62081758
>>62081660
your father clearly has depression and no motivation to fix his life. He must feel no purpose at all. Maybe if you or your sister had children he'd have something to do.

>>62081724
i think his dads house is at the point where simply bulldozing it and building another is the better option. Its america, they make their homes out of duct tape and plywood, it doesnt really matter. My small unit has full internal copper water and gas piping though, so thats not an option for me.

62081778
>>62081637
I'm in the top 7% of wealth for people my age. You people read WAY more into a post than what is actually there. That being said, leaving your only-child a home that's falling apart and still has $75k of debt (currently) on top of that is peak financial stupidity and a sign of complete laziness. It's not entitlement driving the irritation, it's the fact my father chooses to live this way and when that home is passed down you're left with the choice of paying off the remaining debt + spending over $100k repairing and renovating the property, or selling the property and losing the land entirely.

I don't understand how YOU don't understand the problem with this. Of course, you could just be trolling out of boredom.

>>62081724
It's way more than $5k already to fix the basement. It's already at $10k - $15k.

>>62081758
I've thought about that too and just keeping the land (3.5 acres). It's a modular double-wide ranch home. It's basically just a cheap doublewide trailer on top of a basement. 1,600 sqft.

62081783
>>62081758
>Can barely afford to keep this shithole going
>Bro just have a bunch of kids

62081790
>>62078722
You literally are a fat retard.

62081964
>>62078722
>All he does is get drunk, jackoff to porn, blast music and mow the lawn
Giga based. That{s my plan for the next 25 years. Your father has already seen the end of times and heard the echo of Nut's womb and saw that all is vanity.
t. 40 years old fag

62081991
>>62081408
Its OSB, not even plywood anymore. But little OP's dad is trailer trash, there's no reason to even maintain the house because it's worthless but dumbass OP doesn't realize this. Homebaggies really are retarded.

62082141
>>62078722
>All he does is get drunk, jackoff to porn, blast music and mow the lawn.
>Having a parent that is lazy, financially retarded and unhygienic will screw you over
Have some of his habits been installed in you?

62082730
>>62078722
You don't seem to give a shit about your father since you show no concern for his clearly poor mental state. He is likely severely depressed and just waiting to die but rather than thinking about how you can help him your only concern is that he isn't going to leave you a big payday when he croaks. So it seems to me that you will be getting exactly what you deserve. Nothing.

62082791
>>62082730
>I know the family dynamic between a father, his wife, his son and the rest of his family based on a few paragraphs about his poor financial decisions and lifestyle.

This is like blaming the family of a homeless junkie after they attempted to help him multiple times, take him to rehab and save him from himself.

62083742
>>62078722
>The furnace is 20 years old
I once rented a house with a 34 year old furnace. Not like olden immortal boiler or something, forced air natty has with an electric blower. 34 years. I found out the landlord didn't want to replace it as it would mean converting to a high efficiency unit as the old 80% units aren't legal to install here anymore. The high efficiency unit install was going to run upwards of 10k as there was no simple way to install the new pvc flue. Needless to say I did not stay there long. I found out when there was an ignition issue, which he had fixed, then curiously insisted on installing carbon monoxide detectors in every room.

62083898
at least you have one parent that owns some sort of house, even if its some shitty trailer. You don't have to act like you have this giant burden hanging over you. Just sell the turd and wash your hands of it. You're not complaining about inheriting a free house, are you? I wish I could say the same about my dad. He's in his 60s and owns nothing, not even a shitty trailer.

item.title: So, now that assblaster was confirmed controlled opposition, and LINK holders have become "the Cuckolds of Crypto"... — 46 replies — 8.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
So, now that assblaster was confirmed controlled opposition, and LINK holders have become "the Cuckolds of Crypto"...

Open thread • Replies: 46 • Updated: 2026-04-06 17:40 UTC

OP

So, now that assblaster was confirmed controlled opposition, and LINK holders have become "the Cuckolds of Crypto"... shouldn't we have a look at what he told us *not* to buy?

He tried very hard to steer us away from one coin in particular back in 2018.

They wanted you out.

Early replies (first 3)

62077049
well he was right about raiblocks

62077089
>>62077049
Only in the sense that he was "right" about LINK. It's price did go up, yet it achieved nothing. Sergey met Trump and still nobody cares about smartcontracts. LINK had every chance to succeed but failed.

>Controlled opposition is a political or strategic tactic where a governing body, organization, or elite group secretly supports, infiltrates, or manages its own opposition to manipulate dissent, control narratives, and prevent real challenges to the status quo

A functional stateless currency would challenge the status quo, and now it's been "over 5 years under the radar".

Watch how long this thread stays up.

62077098
>>62077000
>>62077049
>>62077089
Bullish for XRP

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62078437
>>62077784
the project works as intended. blame the market participants not treating the coin like a stock. the issue is people don't hold longer than 24 hours anymore and only buy trending coins.

62078484
is XRB supposed to be XRP ?

62078586
>>62078484
Newfag

62078618
>>62077089
>yet it achieved nothing
Chainlink is among the very top in both crypto adoption and non-crypto adoption. By a very wide margin.

You're worryingly low iq.

62078620
>>62078618
The only thing that's "worryingly low" is LINK's price xD

The only thing its adopted are cuckolds online like you

62078663
>>62077915
Is Ari one of us?

62078703
HOLY SHIT

By sheer chance I happened to be watching Sunny today, "The gang finds a dumpster baby", and recognised one of the frames Asslarper used (pic related).

In this episode, Dennis (AB's avatar) convinces an activist to CHAINLINK himself to a tree, then LITERALLY KEKS him.

Now do you believe me?

Inverse Assblaster; what did he tell you was useless?

Raiblocks and Ripple.

Time is running out.

62078711
BOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOM

62078735
He even admitted his intentions in one of his final posts.

This ARG goes DEEP.

62078857
>>62078703
everyone needs to see this

62078921
>>62078618
But didn't you originally intend to make money?
Or are you like a sportsball fan that pays the team regardless of outcome and don't share in the winnings?

62079599
>>62078703
cuckolds of crypto.

It was there the whole time.

62079836
>>62078703
There it is folks.

"Cuckolds of crypto" was planned all along.

If you're still holding LINK after seeing this... well, you deserve what's next.

62079965
>>62078735
Link was .30-.40 when he posted this.

62079978
>>62077648

62080163
>>62077915

>be at the right place at the right time

62080436
>>62079836
pool's closed / thanks for keeping this a link board.

62080485
>>62077089
Thread's still up and likely will be for days because this is a dead board, the irony of you making fun of one group of shitcoin holders for invoking hidden lore/"its a sekret" terminology and doing the same thing in your thread, nobody fucking cares about xrp you boomer faggot.
BOOOOOOOOOOOOOM!

62080493
>12 pbtid
>about raiblocks
Hmmm

62080684
>>62080485
>this is a dead board
It's a dead site, dude. It was fucking swamped with non-whites years ago and they all just go to /b/, /v/ and /pol/ for their le epic psyops and bait threads. All the average intelligence white people that used to be on this website are gone. I dunno where they went. A lot to Twitter, I guess.

62080692
>>62080684
>twitter
Yeah I think so. I’m not smart but I am white and I can’t believe it but I spend a far more amount of time on x now than 4chins. I’ve been here every waking minute since 2011 and never thought this place could be so fucking boring and gay.

62080695
>>62080684

62081569
>>62078703

62082884
>>62078703
remember when hillary talking about pepe was a big deal

62083016
>>62080684
why exactly did this site die off so quickly

x is awful and they're always changing the algorithms
plebbit hasn't been useable for at least 6 years due to insane moderation
every traditional forum is dead

where the hell did everyone go

62083040
>>62083016
Crypto isn't exciting since 2017 ended

Why?

Because people forgot what we were doing here to begin with

People forgot about Raiblocks

Tonight, they will be reminded

item.title: Did you guys see that just recently HEX became the 3rd most held token on all of Ethereum? — 22 replies — 7.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
Did you guys see that just recently HEX became the 3rd most held token on all of Ethereum?

Open thread • Replies: 22 • Updated: 2026-04-06 20:24 UTC

OP

Did you guys see that just recently HEX became the 3rd most held token on all of Ethereum?
Only behind USDC and Tether

Does this give it more legitimacy or will most see through this mass marketing dust campaign?
Either way, it's not cheap to send your coin to 5 million people in a shill campaign.....

Early replies (first 3)

62077138
>>62077135
its totally legit saar, ape in lifesavings!

62077151
read pic
I bca finding out which "wrong-talk" did I type that our janitor is malding over

62077172
>>62077151
Airdropping a fresh coin would mess everything up, so if you're going to fork it anyways, why not make a new chain where the ETH FagFoundation can't make another update that fucks it all up with higher fees?

I agree there is a lot of hate-marketing out there giving bad optics, so many twitter accounts hating and shitting on RH and his coins daily and you just know it's all fueled by rage over their bags they're down bad on

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62077902
fuck off heart you gangster fuck

62077984
>>62077902
how is it so hard to find him? hes literally in estonia and probably hits up the luxury stores once a week lol

62078130
>>62077984
When X enabled location info for profiles last year his account showed south east asia.

>>62077902
fake news, all assault charges have been dropped
it was quite possibly completely made up just to get him on the interpol list since you can't be on there for non-violent crimes.

62078173
>>62077135
What’s the difference between pHEX, eHEX and HEX in ethereum? I can’t tell you because idgaf I’m all in pDAI niggers

62078189
>>62077172
>why not make a new chain where the ETH FagFoundation can't make another update that fucks it all up with higher fees?
because you're overcomplicating the project which was supposed to be pure game-theory of stakers vs LPers/ traders

now you have a shitshow that sent this to a -99% death chart
it's dead because of it

>Airdropping a fresh coin would mess everything up
it would mess NOTHING up
hex was an airdrop to bitcoin holders in the first place

62078192
>>62078173
see
this is what I mean
now you have the pDAI shitshow
you have pHEX, eHEX, pulseX
it's a fucking circus

richard fucking failed because he didn't listen to his own advice

62078714
>>62078130
sure thing mr goldstein

62078715
>>62078130
>non-violent
rape is a violent crime

62078740
>>62078173
pDAI to Dorra.

62078749
>>62077135
>3rd most wash-traded coin on ethereum
Ftfya

62079415
>>62078740
>pDAI to Dorra.
Pulsechain needs its own native stabefuck. $1 is inevitable

62079565
>>62079415
>>62078800
>>62078740
#WARNING

The fork of DAI on Pulsechain is exploited, it was minted for FREE by malicious exploiters who use bots to try their best to shill this token. They minted millions of it for free and want others to buy it from them. Do not buy.

The shill campaign is completely out of narratives now, it's just brainless shill slop

62080953
>>62079565
pDAI is going to a Dollar, but I don't know when.

62081000
>>62080953
The peggening is coming and there’s nothing hextards can do to stop it

62081294
It has the #2 spot in its sights
Holders vary by block explorer, Etherscan already shows HEX with more holders than USDC.....

62081572
>>62077135
yeah i still have my 101 that the scammer shoved into my address 100 years ago

62083705
>>62081000
Hexicans will win too. Everyone will win in the end.

item.title: >Setting up the next TACO for the market pump AGAIN. — 54 replies — 6.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
>Setting up the next TACO for the market pump AGAIN.

Open thread • Replies: 54 • Updated: 2026-04-06 15:27 UTC

OP

>Setting up the next TACO for the market pump AGAIN.
>This will still have an impact on markets
It's all so tiresome

Early replies (first 3)

62076909
>>62076906
but... what if... he doesnt taco this time........

62076912
>>62076906
how is this setting up the next TACO?

62076916
>>62076906
he's right though. The Scrum Masters are in trouble, so we need an emergency TACO and bailout.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62078979
>>62078435
He is quoting Chance the Rapper on Ultralight Beam

62079026
How can Iran still have power plants on Tuesday if they were bombed into the stone age today?

62079077
>>62079026
The miracles of Allah I guess lol

62079081
>>62079026
uhoh, melty

62079387
>>62079026
They've already rebuilt them.

62079681
>>62079026
Op already confirmed

62079710
>>62076906
Events are now outpacing any taco

62079718
>>62076906
So fucking tiresome. I’m long oil over this weekend and fully expect to lose money somehow. It’s insane

62079908
What is even his goal here? In the current situation either caves to a major chokehold on the world economy partly caused by himself while looking weak, or commits genocide by pulling a Morgenthau on Iran. Both which will crush him domestically.

62079921
>>62079908
There is no goal, right from the start he simply didn't think it through and acted out of impulse or was manipulated by someone else into thinking it would be an easy victory.

62081203
>>62076906
he thinks he's God now?

62081233
>>62079718
Buy the rumor sell the news fag

Has your faggot brain not realized this?

62081452
>>62079718
I think buying and selling oil over the last few weeks has aged me by about 5 years. The market is so disconnected from reality and just pure Trump manipulated bullshit

62081453
>>62076906
god? but... what about muh allah?

62081610
>>62077003
Sure, buddy. Another two weeks?

62081612
I need a million bucks so I can leave this doomed country and fuck all the brown women left behind by the dumb shitskins moving here.

62081618
>>62076909
this is the problem with twitter...if you actually watch the related video, there is a taco bell in the background.

62081622
News outlets never post how the guys in charge continue to say the strait will remain closed no matter what. Just fake ceasefire headline after fake ceasefire headline from their Jewish overlords who have long positions open

62081626
>>62079710
how convenient

anglos are cucks

62081627
All according to 5D keikaku (keikaku means plan)

62081671
>>62079908
To delay for 2 more weeks in hopes for a deus ex machina moment.

62081674
After speaking to many many experts on the subject we are all in agreement that the answer is: 2 more weeks

62081676
>>62076906
what does taco mean

62081869
>>62081612
>dumb shitskins moving here
Yeah at this point shitskins moving there for work are retarded. They are just used as work and tax slave for the system.

62081875
>>62081676
TitsAssCockOrange

62081877
>>62081676
Tickle
Ashkenazi
Cock
Orally

62081885
>>62077047
>he fell for the towelhead propaganda
yikes

62082278
Even if the Iranians give in and open the straight, the kikes would probably just blow shit up anyways. Never trust an oven dodger.

62082371
>>62076917
>some bullshit about how Iran and the US made amazing progress
what if that's not bullshit?
Price of oil is reactionary to the narrative, not necessarily reality.
Oil prices may be elevated purely on the narrative that trump is lying.
He might be, but he might not be.
The media convinced you that negotiations arent happening
But what even are their sources to claim Trump isnt telling the truth?

62082383
>>62082371
What if I'm actually having sex your mother, and grandmother right now simultaneously? Have you thought of that?
